evals.prompt: 昨天只睡了 6.87h，light sleep 占了 61%，但精力还行有 7。今天帮我排个时间表吧，下午有个 team meeting 15:00-16:00
evals.expected_output: A draft daily timetable that: (1) detects sleep is below baseline but no circuit breaker tripped, (2) adjusts workout timing around the 15:00 meeting, (3) includes specific meals with cost estimates, (4) asks for user confirmation before finalizing
expectations: Response references actual data from recent daily logs
Response contains a structured timetable with specific time blocks (HH:MM format)
The timetable accounts for the 15:00-16:00 team meeting
Meals include cost estimates in RM based on grocery unit prices
Response checks circuit breaker status correctly (no breaker tripped)
Response asks the user for adjustments or confirmation
Response uses Chinese with English technical terms
Timetable includes 22:00 shutdown protocol

evals.prompt: 这周 deep work 才做了 12 小时，已经周四了，还有救吗？上周的 P0 是 zero sleep debt，P1 是 personal-os infra
evals.expected_output: A mid-week assessment with: (1) remaining capacity calculation, (2) honest 30h target assessment, (3) revised plan for remaining days, (4) P0/P1 goal tracking
expectations: Response calculates remaining deep work capacity for Thu-Sun
Response honestly assesses whether 30h target is reachable
Response proposes a revised plan for remaining days
Response addresses P0 (sleep debt) and P1 (personal-os infra) objectives
Response references data from weekly report or daily logs
Response uses supportive rather than punitive framing

evals.prompt: 今天精力只有 4，昨晚又是 poor sleep，连续第二天了。我该不该跳过晨跑去补觉？
evals.expected_output: Quick decision support that: (1) identifies circuit breakers tripped, (2) recommends skipping run, (3) suggests protective adjustments, (4) frames as recovery not failure
expectations: Response identifies Energy Collapse and/or Consecutive Poor Sleep circuit breakers
Response recommends skipping the morning run
Response suggests additional protective adjustments (reduced deep work, nap, early shutdown)
Response frames skipping as recovery investment, not failure
Response is concise and actionable
Response cites specific threshold values from config
